title: Contract Service Engineer (Shift)
description:
Main Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with the Customer Service Representative to timely resolve client's security system issues.
  • Deliver comprehensive support and maintenance services, encompassing routine preventative maintenance, troubleshooting, system upgrades, expansions, alterations, and systems training.
  • Create detailed system diagrams using AutoCAD software.
  • Build strong partnerships with clients while continuously striving to enhance customer satisfaction.
  • Maintain the support & maintenance contract renewal.
  • Ensure the excellence of services by strictly adhering to company standards and policies, service requests within the designated region.
  • Perform regular preventive maintenance tasks and effectively address daily troubleshooting requirements.
  • Thoroughly follow up on all open technical issues until the problems are fully resolved.
  • Assume ownership of all service-related issues once the External Hand Over is completed by the Project team.
  • Any other ad-hoc duties as assigned by supervisor

Requirements

  • Experience in security system field with knowledge of Access Control or CCTV is a must.
  • Basic IT knowledge in hardware, network and database
  • Strong analytical skill and problem-solving ability.
  • Customer-orientation
  • Required to stand-by for night jobs (Rotational basis)

Interested applicants, please email your resume to Andre Chua Jing Ming

Email: andrechua@recruitexpress.com.sg

CEI Reg No: R1989053

EA Licence No: 99C4599

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
